arn.description: Amazon Resource Name used for IAM policies and API operations

cluster_members.description: List of instances currently part of the Neptune cluster

cluster_resource_id.description: Internal resource ID for tracking the Neptune cluster

endpoint.description: Main endpoint to connect to the Neptune cluster for queries

hosted_zone_id.description: DNS hosted zone ID for managing Neptune cluster records

id.description: Unique identifier for the Neptune cluster resource

reader_endpoint.description: Dedicated endpoint for load-balanced read operations
